form.prologue: Hi! I'm your assistant. What can I do for you?

form.script:
import os import re import math import json import base64 import hashlib import io import tempfile import subprocess import sys import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET from typing import Any, Optional # ============================================================ # 0. 依赖处理 # ============================================================ try: import ezdxf except ModuleNotFoundError: subprocess.check_call( [sys.executable, "-m", "pip", "install", "ezdxf", "--quiet"] ) import ezdxf # ============================================================ # 1. 全局配置 # ============================================================ CAD_SYMBOL_MAP = { "%%c": "⌀", "%%C": "⌀", "%%p": "±", "%%P": "±", "%%d": "°", "%%D": "°", "φ": "⌀", "Φ": "⌀", "Ø": "⌀", "ø": "⌀", } FEATURE_RULES = { "A": { "type": "thread_hole", "label": "A 螺纹孔/定位孔", }, "E": { "type": "wire_cut", "label": "E 线割孔/割孔", }, "F": { "type": "insert_fixing_hole", "label": "F 镶件固定孔", }, "G": { "type": "wire_cut", "label": "G 冲切刀口/线割", }, "J": { "type": "counterbore", "label": "J 贯穿沉孔", }, "L1": { "type": "slot_or_wire_cut", "label": "L1 槽/线切割", }, "S": { "type": "screw_hole", "label": "S 螺丝孔/特殊孔", }, "T": { "type": "thread_hole", "label": "T 攻牙孔", }, "X": { "type": "special_process", "label": "X 特殊加工", }, } EXPECTED_FEATURE_CODES = set(FEATURE_RULES.keys()) IGNORE_FEATURE_LAYERS = { "图框线", "图框", "标题栏", "TITLE", "BORDER", "FRAME", "DIM", "DIMENSION", "CENTER", "公差", } TECH_KEYWORDS = [ "加工说明", "技术要求", "割", "线割", "孔", "沉头", "沉孔", "贯穿", "攻", "攻牙", "镶件", "固定孔", "深", "M12", "M10", "M8", "M6", "M5", "M4", "刀口", "国产", "SKD61", "热处理", "硬度", "倒角", "去毛刺", "粗糙度", "公差", "穿孔机", "基准孔", "刃口", "零件名称", ] # ============================================================ # 2. 基础工具函数 # ============================================================ def safe_float(value: Any, default: Optional[float] = None) -> Optional[float]: try: return float(value) except Exception: return default def round_num(value: Any, ndigits: int = 3) -> Optional[float]: value = safe_float(value) if value is None: return None return round(value, ndigits) def distance(p1: dict, p2: dict) -> float: return math.sqrt((p1["x"] - p2["x"]) ** 2 + (p1["y"] - p2["y"]) ** 2) def clean_cad_text(text: Any) -> str: if text is None: return "" text = str(text) for src, dst in CAD_SYMBOL_MAP.items(): text = text.replace(src, dst) text = text.replace("\\P", "\n").replace("\\p", "\n") text = re.sub(r"\\S([^;^]+)\^([^;]+);", r"\1/\2", text) text = re.sub(r"\\S([^;/]+)/([^;]+);", r"\1/\2", text) text = re.sub(r"\\[AaCcFfHhLlOoQqTtWw][^;]*;", "", text) text = text.replace("{", "").replace("}", "") text = re.sub(r"\\[A-Za-z]+", "", text) text = re.sub(r"\s*[:：]\s*", " : ", text) text = re.sub(r"[ \t\r\f\v]+", " ", text) text = re.sub(r"\n\s*\n+", "\n", text) return text.strip() def unique_keep_order(items: list[str]) -> list[str]: result = [] seen = set() for item in items: item = clean_cad_text(item) if not item: continue if item not in seen: seen.add(item) result.append(item) return result def is_title_or_border_layer(layer: str) -> bool: if not layer: return False layer_upper = str(layer).upper() for key in IGNORE_FEATURE_LAYERS: if key.upper() in layer_upper: return True return False def is_valid_feature_label_text(text: str) -> bool: """ 只允许独立代号参与几何绑定。 例如 A、G、J、L1 可以； X.±0.2、.X±0.1、A : xxx 不可以。 """ if not text: return False t = clean_cad_text(text).strip().upper().replace(" ", "") return t in FEATURE_RULES def is_process_definition_text(text: str) -> bool: """ A : xxx、G : xxx 这类是加工说明定义， 不能直接作为图上的点位。 """ if not text: return False t = clean_cad_text(text).strip().upper() return bool(re.match(r"^(L1|A|E|F|G|J|S|T|X)\s*[:：]", t)) def is_valid_process_note(text: str) -> bool: if not text: return False t = clean_cad_text(text).strip().upper() if is_process_definition_text(t): return True for keyword in TECH_KEYWORDS: if keyword.upper() in t: return True return False def svg_escape(text: Any) -> str: text = "" if text is None else str(text) return ( text.replace("&", "&") .replace("<", "<") .replace(">", ">") .replace('"', """) ) def _svg_float(value: Any, default: float = 0.0) -> float: if value is None: return default match = re.search(r"-?\d+(?:\.\d+)?", str(value)) if not match: return default return float(match.group(0)) def _svg_color(value: Any, default: tuple[int, int, int, int]) -> tuple[int, int, int, int]: value = ("" if value is None else str(value)).strip() if not value or value == "none": return default if value.startswith("#"): value = value[1:] if len(value) == 3: value = "".join(ch * 2 for ch in value) if len(value) == 6: return ( int(value[0:2], 16), int(value[2:4], 16), int(value[4:6], 16), 255, ) return default def _svg_font(size: int, bold: bool = False): try: from PIL import ImageFont except ModuleNotFoundError: return None candidates = [ r"C:\Windows\Fonts\msyhbd.ttc" if bold else r"C:\Windows\Fonts\msyh.ttc", r"C:\Windows\Fonts\simhei.ttf", r"C:\Windows\Fonts\arialbd.ttf" if bold else r"C:\Windows\Fonts\arial.ttf", ] for path in candidates: if os.path.exists(path): try: return ImageFont.truetype(path, size) except Exception: pass return ImageFont.load_default() def svg_to_png_bytes(svg: str) -> bytes: try: from PIL import Image, ImageDraw except ModuleNotFoundError: subprocess.check_call( [sys.executable, "-m", "pip", "install", "pillow", "--quiet"] ) from PIL import Image, ImageDraw root = ET.fromstring(svg) width = int(_svg_float(root.attrib.get("width"), 900)) height = int(_svg_float(root.attrib.get("height"), 700)) image = Image.new("RGBA", (width, height), (255, 255, 255, 0)) draw = ImageDraw.Draw(image) def tag_name(element): return element.tag.rsplit("}", 1)[-1] for element in root.iter(): tag = tag_name(element) if tag in {"svg", "g", "title"}: continue fill_raw = element.attrib.get("fill") stroke_raw = element.attrib.get("stroke") fill = None if fill_raw == "none" else _svg_color(fill_raw, (0, 0, 0, 255)) stroke = None if stroke_raw in (None, "none") else _svg_color(stroke_raw, (0, 0, 0, 255)) stroke_width = max(int(round(_svg_float(element.attrib.get("stroke-width"), 1))), 1) if tag == "rect": x = _svg_float(element.attrib.get("x")) y = _svg_float(element.attrib.get("y")) w = _svg_float(element.attrib.get("width")) h = _svg_float(element.attrib.get("height")) rx = _svg_float(element.attrib.get("rx")) box = [x, y, x + w, y + h] if rx > 0: draw.rounded_rectangle(box, radius=rx, fill=fill, outline=stroke, width=stroke_width) else: draw.rectangle(box, fill=fill, outline=stroke, width=stroke_width) elif tag == "circle": cx = _svg_float(element.attrib.get("cx")) cy = _svg_float(element.attrib.get("cy")) r = _svg_float(element.attrib.get("r")) draw.ellipse([cx - r, cy - r, cx + r, cy + r], fill=fill, outline=stroke, width=stroke_width) elif tag == "line": x1 = _svg_float(element.attrib.get("x1")) y1 = _svg_float(element.attrib.get("y1")) x2 = _svg_float(element.attrib.get("x2")) y2 = _svg_float(element.attrib.get("y2")) draw.line([x1, y1, x2, y2], fill=stroke or fill, width=stroke_width) elif tag == "text": x = _svg_float(element.attrib.get("x")) y = _svg_float(element.attrib.get("y")) size = int(_svg_float(element.attrib.get("font-size"), 12)) bold = str(element.attrib.get("font-weight", "")).lower() in {"700", "bold"} text = "".join(element.itertext()).strip() draw.text((x, y - size), text, fill=fill, font=_svg_font(size, bold)) buffer = io.BytesIO() image.convert("RGB").save(buffer, format="PNG") return buffer.getvalue() def save_board_png(svg: str) -> tuple[str, Optional[str]]: png = svg_to_png_bytes(svg) digest = hashlib.sha1(png).hexdigest()[:16] filename = f"die_feature_board_{digest}.png" output_dir = os.environ.get( "RAGFLOW_REPORT_IMAGE_DIR", os.path.join(tempfile.gettempdir(), "ragflow_report_images"), ) os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True) image_path = os.path.abspath(os.path.join(output_dir, filename)) with open(image_path, "wb") as f: f.write(png) base_url = os.environ.get("RAGFLOW_REPORT_IMAGE_BASE_URL", "").strip() if not base_url: return image_path, None image_url = base_url.rstrip("/") + "/" + filename return image_path, image_url def save_board_artifact(svg: str) -> str: png = svg_to_png_bytes(svg) output_dir = os.path.abspath("artifacts") os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True) image_path = os.path.join(output_dir, "die_feature_board.png") with open(image_path, "wb") as f: f.write(png) encoded = base64.b64encode(png).decode("ascii") html_path = os.path.join(output_dir, "die_feature_board.html") html = f""" DIE feature board """ with open(html_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(html) return image_path def svg_to_markdown_image(svg: str) -> str: """ 把 SVG 转成 base64 图片，避免 Markdown/RAGFlow 把 SVG 标签当普通文本显示。 """ try: image_path = save_board_artifact(svg) html_path = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(image_path), "die_feature_board.html") return ( "图片已生成到 artifacts 目录：\n" f"- PNG: `{image_path}`\n" f"- HTML: `{html_path}`\n\n" "当前 Markdown 页面会清空 data:image，因此不能在正文内直接显示。" "请在流程外层使用 artifact/附件展示，或打开 HTML artifact。" ) return ( "> 当前 Markdown 渲染器会清空 data:image 的 src，图片已改为生成 PNG 文件。\n\n" f"- PNG 文件: `{image_path}`\n" "- 要在报告中直接显示，请把该目录映射为静态资源，并设置环境变量 " "`RAGFLOW_REPORT_IMAGE_BASE_URL` 为可访问的 http(s) 地址。" ) except Exception as exc: return f"> 图片生成失败: {exc}" # ============================================================ # 3. Base64 与 DXF 读取 # ============================================================ def svg_to_image_src(svg: str) -> str: png = svg_to_png_bytes(svg) encoded = base64.b64encode(png).decode("ascii") return f"data:image/png;base64,{encoded}" def render_feature_html_board(model: dict, raw: dict, debug: bool = False) -> str: canvas_w = 900 canvas_h = 700 header_h = 120 padding = 70 bounds = get_feature_bounds(model, raw) base_map_xy, scale = make_mapper(bounds, canvas_w, canvas_h - header_h, padding) def map_xy(x: float, y: float) -> tuple[float, float]: sx, sy = base_map_xy(x, y) return sx, round(sy + header_h, 3) part = model.get("part", {}) features = model.get("features", []) found_codes = ", ".join(model.get("found_feature_codes", [])) or "无" positioned_codes = ", ".join(model.get("positioned_feature_codes", [])) or "无" missing_codes = ", ".join(model.get("missing_feature_codes", [])) or "无" plate_x, plate_y = map_xy(bounds["min_x"], bounds["max_y"]) plate_w = bounds["width"] * scale plate_h = bounds["height"] * scale def esc(value: Any) -> str: return svg_escape("" if value is None else value) def layer_style(**items): return "; ".join(f"{k.replace('_', '-')}: {v}" for k, v in items.items() if v is not None) parts = [ f'
', '
DIE 模板动态解析看板
', f'
零件: {esc(part.get("name") or "未知")} ｜ 材料: {esc(part.get("material") or "未知")} ｜ 尺寸: {esc(part.get("width"))} x {esc(part.get("height"))} x {esc(part.get("thickness"))}
', f'
已识别代号: {esc(found_codes)} ｜ 已绑定坐标: {esc(positioned_codes)} ｜ 疑似缺失: {esc(missing_codes)}
', f'
', f'
图纸边界: X {round(bounds["min_x"], 2)} ~ {round(bounds["max_x"], 2)}, Y {round(bounds["min_y"], 2)} ~ {round(bounds["max_y"], 2)} ｜ 来源: {esc(bounds["source"])}
', ] if debug: for c in raw.get("circles", []): if is_title_or_border_layer(c.get("layer", "")): continue sx, sy = map_xy(c["x"], c["y"]) r = max(c["radius"] * scale, 3.0) parts.append( f'
' ) for f in features: x = f.get("x") y = f.get("y") if not isinstance(x, (int, float)) or not isinstance(y, (int, float)): continue sx, sy = map_xy(x, y) code = esc(f.get("code", "?")) ftype = f.get("type", "unknown") diameter = f.get("diameter") or 8.0 r = max((diameter / 2) * scale, 4.0) color = "#2563eb" fill = "#eff6ff" border_style = "solid" if ftype == "counterbore": color = "#7c3aed" fill = "transparent" elif ftype == "thread_hole": color = "#0891b2" fill = "#ecfeff" elif ftype == "wire_cut": color = "#ea580c" fill = "#fff7ed" border_style = "dashed" elif ftype == "special_process": color = "#dc2626" fill = "transparent" parts.append( f'
' ) if ftype == "special_process": parts.append(f'
') parts.append(f'
') parts.append(f'{code}') legend_x = 680 legend_y = 130 parts.extend([ f'
', f'
图例
', f'
普通孔 / 定位孔', f'
线割 / 割孔', f'
沉孔 / 贯穿沉孔', f'
槽 / 线割轮廓', f'特殊加工 X', "
", ]) return "\n".join(parts) def build_html_report(model: dict, raw: dict, svg: str) -> str: part = model.get("part", {}) counts = model.get("raw_counts", {}) def esc(value: Any) -> str: return svg_escape("" if value is None else value) feature_rows = [] for f in model.get("features", []): feature_rows.append( "" f"{esc(f.get('code'))}" f"{esc(f.get('type'))}" f"({esc(f.get('x'))}, {esc(f.get('y'))})" f"{esc(f.get('diameter'))}" f"{esc(f.get('description'))}" "" ) notes = "".join(f"
  • {esc(note)}
    • " for note in model.get("process_notes", [])) warnings = "".join(f"
  • {esc(w)}
    • " for w in model.get("warnings", [])) or "
  • 无
    • " stats = "".join( f"
  • {esc(key)}: {esc(value)}
    • " for key, value in sorted(raw.get("entity_stats", {}).items()) ) or "
  • 无
    • " return f""" 机械模具图纸矢量数据智能解析报告

    机械模具图纸矢量数据智能解析报告

    1. 零件基础信息

    • 零件名称: {esc(part.get("name") or "未识别")}
    • 材料: {esc(part.get("material") or "未识别")}
    • 宽度: {esc(part.get("width"))}
    • 高度: {esc(part.get("height"))}
    • 厚度: {esc(part.get("thickness"))}

    2. 解析统计

    • TEXT / MTEXT / ATTRIB 文本数量: {esc(counts.get("texts", 0))}
    • DIMENSION 尺寸数量: {esc(counts.get("dimensions", 0))}
    • CIRCLE 圆/孔数量: {esc(counts.get("circles", 0))}
    • ARC 圆弧数量: {esc(counts.get("arcs", 0))}
    • LINE 线段数量: {esc(counts.get("lines", 0))}
    • POLYLINE 多段线数量: {esc(counts.get("polylines", 0))}

    3. 特征识别结果

    {''.join(feature_rows)}
    代号类型坐标直径说明

    4. 加工说明

      {notes}

    5. 动态看板

    {svg}

    6. 结构化 JSON

    {esc(json.dumps(model, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))}

    7. 解析告警

      {warnings}

    8. DXF 实体统计

      {stats}
    """ def render_feature_markdown_board(model: dict) -> list[str]: rows = [] rows.append("当前页面会拆坏 SVG/HTML 图片，因此这里使用稳定的 Markdown 表格看板。") rows.append("") rows.append("| 代号 | 类型 | X | Y | 直径 | 图层 | 说明 |") rows.append("|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---|---|") for f in model.get("features", []): rows.append( "| " + " | ".join( [ str(f.get("code", "")), str(f.get("type", "")), str(f.get("x", "")), str(f.get("y", "")), str(f.get("diameter", "")), str(f.get("layer", "")), str(f.get("description", "")).replace("|", "/"), ] ) + " |" ) if len(rows) == 2: rows.append("| - | - | - | - | - | - | 暂无已绑定坐标的特征 |") rows.append("") rows.append("**图例**") rows.append("") rows.append("| 类型 | 含义 |") rows.append("|---|---|") rows.append("| counterbore | 沉孔 / 贯穿沉孔 |") rows.append("| thread_hole | 攻牙孔 |") rows.append("| wire_cut | 线割 / 割孔 |") rows.append("| slot_or_wire_cut | 槽 / 线割轮廓 |") rows.append("| special_process | 特殊加工 |") rows.append("| insert_fixing_hole | 镶件固定孔 |") return rows def decode_base64_dxf(raw_content: str) -> str: if not raw_content or not raw_content.strip(): raise ValueError("输入内容为空") content = raw_content.strip() if "base64," in content: content = content.split("base64,", 1)[1] content = re.sub(r"\s+", "", content) decoded_bytes = base64.b64decode(content, validate=False) for encoding in ["utf-8", "gbk", "gb2312", "big5", "latin1"]: try: return decoded_bytes.decode(encoding, errors="ignore") except Exception: pass return decoded_bytes.decode("utf-8", errors="ignore") def parse_dxf_document(dxf_text: str): temp_path = None try: with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile( mode="w", suffix=".dxf", delete=False, encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore", ) as f: f.write(dxf_text) temp_path = f.name return ezdxf.readfile(temp_path) finally: if temp_path and os.path.exists(temp_path): os.remove(temp_path) # ============================================================ # 4. DXF 实体提取 # ============================================================ def get_point(entity: Any, attr_name: str) -> Optional[dict]: try: point = getattr(entity.dxf, attr_name) return { "x": round(float(point.x), 3), "y": round(float(point.y), 3), } except Exception: return None def get_entity_layer(entity: Any) -> str: try: return str(entity.dxf.layer) except Exception: return "" def get_entity_text(entity: Any) -> str: try: dxftype = entity.dxftype() if dxftype == "TEXT": return clean_cad_text(entity.dxf.text) if dxftype == "MTEXT": return clean_cad_text(entity.plain_text()) if dxftype == "ATTRIB": return clean_cad_text(entity.dxf.text) if dxftype == "ATTDEF": return clean_cad_text(entity.dxf.text) if hasattr(entity, "plain_text"): return clean_cad_text(entity.plain_text()) if hasattr(entity.dxf, "text"): return clean_cad_text(entity.dxf.text) except Exception: pass return "" def extract_dimension_text(entity: Any) -> list[str]: result = [] try: raw_text = clean_cad_text(entity.dxf.text) if raw_text and raw_text != "<>": result.append(raw_text) else: try: measurement = entity.get_measurement() if measurement is not None: result.append(f"{measurement:g}") except Exception: pass try: for v in entity.virtual_entities(): text = get_entity_text(v) if text and text != "<>": result.append(text) except Exception: pass try: g_block = entity.get_geometry_block() if g_block: for e in g_block: text = get_entity_text(e) if text and text != "<>": result.append(text) except Exception: pass except Exception: pass return result def extract_lwpolyline_points(entity: Any) -> list[dict]: points = [] try: if entity.dxftype() == "LWPOLYLINE": for p in entity.get_points(): points.append({ "x": round(float(p[0]), 3), "y": round(float(p[1]), 3), }) elif entity.dxftype() == "POLYLINE": for vertex in entity.vertices: loc = vertex.dxf.location points.append({ "x": round(float(loc.x), 3), "y": round(float(loc.y), 3), }) except Exception: pass return points def extract_insert_entities(insert_entity: Any, layout_name: str) -> dict: result = { "texts": [], "circles": [], "lines": [], "arcs": [], "polylines": [], } block_name = "" insert_point = get_point(insert_entity, "insert") try: block_name = clean_cad_text(insert_entity.dxf.name) except Exception: pass try: for attrib in insert_entity.attribs: tag = clean_cad_text(getattr(attrib.dxf, "tag", "")) value = clean_cad_text(attrib.dxf.text) point = get_point(attrib, "insert") or insert_point if tag and value: text = f"{tag}: {value}" else: text = value if text: result["texts"].append({ "text": text, "x": point["x"] if point else None, "y": point["y"] if point else None, "layer": get_entity_layer(attrib), "layout": layout_name, "source": "ATTRIB", "block": block_name, }) except Exception: pass try: virtual_entities = insert_entity.virtual_entities() except Exception: virtual_entities = [] for v in virtual_entities: try: dxftype = v.dxftype() layer = get_entity_layer(v) if dxftype in ["TEXT", "MTEXT", "ATTRIB", "ATTDEF"]: text = get_entity_text(v) point = get_point(v, "insert") or insert_point if text: result["texts"].append({ "text": text, "x": point["x"] if point else None, "y": point["y"] if point else None, "layer": layer, "layout": layout_name, "source": f"INSERT.{dxftype}", "block": block_name, }) elif dxftype == "CIRCLE": center = get_point(v, "center") radius = round_num(v.dxf.radius) if center and radius is not None: result["circles"].append({ "x": center["x"], "y": center["y"], "radius": radius, "diameter": round(radius * 2, 3), "layer": layer, "layout": layout_name, "source": "INSERT.CIRCLE", "block": block_name, }) elif dxftype == "ARC": center = get_point(v, "center") radius = round_num(v.dxf.radius) if center and radius is not None: result["arcs"].append({ "x": center["x"], "y": center["y"], "radius": radius, "diameter": round(radius * 2, 3), "layer": layer, "layout": layout_name, "source": "INSERT.ARC", "block": block_name, }) elif dxftype == "LINE": start = get_point(v, "start") end = get_point(v, "end") if start and end: result["lines"].append({ "start": start, "end": end, "layer": layer, "layout": layout_name, "source": "INSERT.LINE", "block": block_name, }) elif dxftype in ["LWPOLYLINE", "POLYLINE"]: points = extract_lwpolyline_points(v) result["polylines"].append({ "points": points, "layer": layer, "layout": layout_name, "source": f"INSERT.{dxftype}", "block": block_name, }) except Exception: continue return result def extract_raw_entities(doc: Any) -> dict: raw = { "texts": [], "dimensions": [], "circles": [], "arcs": [], "lines": [], "polylines": [], "entity_stats": {}, "warnings": [], } layouts = [] try: layouts.append(doc.modelspace()) except Exception: pass try: for layout in doc.layouts: if layout.name != "Model": layouts.append(layout) except Exception: pass for layout in layouts: layout_name = getattr(layout, "name", "Model") for entity in layout: try: dxftype = entity.dxftype() stat_key = f"{layout_name}.{dxftype}" raw["entity_stats"][stat_key] = raw["entity_stats"].get(stat_key, 0) + 1 layer = get_entity_layer(entity) if dxftype in ["TEXT", "MTEXT", "ATTRIB", "ATTDEF"]: text = get_entity_text(entity) point = get_point(entity, "insert") if text: raw["texts"].append({ "text": text, "x": point["x"] if point else None, "y": point["y"] if point else None, "layer": layer, "layout": layout_name, "source": dxftype, "block": None, }) elif dxftype == "DIMENSION": dim_texts = extract_dimension_text(entity) for dim in dim_texts: raw["dimensions"].append({ "text": dim, "layer": layer, "layout": layout_name, "source": "DIMENSION", }) elif dxftype == "CIRCLE": center = get_point(entity, "center") radius = round_num(entity.dxf.radius) if center and radius is not None: raw["circles"].append({ "x": center["x"], "y": center["y"], "radius": radius, "diameter": round(radius * 2, 3), "layer": layer, "layout": layout_name, "source": "CIRCLE", "block": None, }) elif dxftype == "ARC": center = get_point(entity, "center") radius = round_num(entity.dxf.radius) if center and radius is not None: raw["arcs"].append({ "x": center["x"], "y": center["y"], "radius": radius, "diameter": round(radius * 2, 3), "layer": layer, "layout": layout_name, "source": "ARC", "block": None, }) elif dxftype == "LINE": start = get_point(entity, "start") end = get_point(entity, "end") if start and end: raw["lines"].append({ "start": start, "end": end, "layer": layer, "layout": layout_name, "source": "LINE", "block": None, }) elif dxftype in ["LWPOLYLINE", "POLYLINE"]: points = extract_lwpolyline_points(entity) raw["polylines"].append({ "points": points, "layer": layer, "layout": layout_name, "source": dxftype, "block": None, }) elif dxftype == "INSERT": insert_data = extract_insert_entities(entity, layout_name) for key in ["texts", "circles", "arcs", "lines", "polylines"]: raw[key].extend(insert_data.get(key, [])) except Exception as exc: try: raw["warnings"].append( f"{layout_name} 中 {entity.dxftype()} 解析失败: {exc}" ) except Exception: raw["warnings"].append(f"{layout_name} 中未知实体解析失败: {exc}") return raw # ============================================================ # 5. 零件信息识别 # ============================================================ def extract_part_info(raw: dict) -> dict: all_text = "\n".join( [t["text"] for t in raw.get("texts", []) if t.get("text")] ) all_dim_text = "\n".join( [d["text"] for d in raw.get("dimensions", []) if d.get("text")] ) merged = all_text + "\n" + all_dim_text part = { "name": None, "material": None, "width": None, "height": None, "thickness": None, } for t in raw.get("texts", []): text = t.get("text", "") if "零件名称" in text: value = text.split(":", 1)[-1].strip() if ":" in text else text part["name"] = clean_cad_text(value) break if not part["name"]: name_patterns = [ r"\bDIE[-_ ]?\d+\b", r"下模板镶件", r"模板", ] for pattern in name_patterns: match = re.search(pattern, merged, flags=re.IGNORECASE) if match: part["name"] = clean_cad_text(match.group(0)) break material_patterns = [ r"国产\s*SKD61", r"SKD61", r"SKD11", r"Cr12MoV", r"NAK80", r"S136", r"718H", ] for pattern in material_patterns: match = re.search(pattern, merged, flags=re.IGNORECASE) if match: part["material"] = clean_cad_text(match.group(0)) break size_patterns = [ r"(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)\s*[xX×＊*]\s*(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)\s*[xX×＊*]\s*(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)", r"(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)\s*[xX×＊*]\s*(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)", ] for pattern in size_patterns: match = re.search(pattern, merged) if match: nums = [float(v) for v in match.groups()] if len(nums) >= 2: part["width"] = nums[0] part["height"] = nums[1] if len(nums) >= 3: part["thickness"] = nums[2] break xs = [] ys = [] for c in raw.get("circles", []): if is_title_or_border_layer(c.get("layer", "")): continue xs.extend([c["x"] - c["radius"], c["x"] + c["radius"]]) ys.extend([c["y"] - c["radius"], c["y"] + c["radius"]]) for line in raw.get("lines", []): if is_title_or_border_layer(line.get("layer", "")): continue xs.extend([line["start"]["x"], line["end"]["x"]]) ys.extend([line["start"]["y"], line["end"]["y"]]) for poly in raw.get("polylines", []): if is_title_or_border_layer(poly.get("layer", "")): continue for p in poly.get("points", []): xs.append(p["x"]) ys.append(p["y"]) for t in raw.get("texts", []): if is_title_or_border_layer(t.get("layer", "")): continue if t.get("x") is not None and t.get("y") is not None: xs.append(t["x"]) ys.append(t["y"]) if xs and ys: min_x = min(xs) max_x = max(xs) min_y = min(ys) max_y = max(ys) estimated_width = round(max_x - min_x, 3) estimated_height = round(max_y - min_y, 3) if not part["width"]: part["width"] = estimated_width if not part["height"]: part["height"] = estimated_height part["estimated_bounds"] = { "min_x": round(min_x, 3), "max_x": round(max_x, 3), "min_y": round(min_y, 3), "max_y": round(max_y, 3), } return part # ============================================================ # 6. 特征识别 # ============================================================ def extract_feature_code_from_text(text: str, strict: bool = False) -> Optional[str]: if not text: return None raw_text = clean_cad_text(text).strip() normalized = raw_text.upper().replace(" ", "") if strict: if normalized in FEATURE_RULES: return normalized return None match = re.match(r"^(L1|A|E|F|G|J|S|T|X)\s*[:：]", raw_text.upper()) if match: return match.group(1) if normalized in FEATURE_RULES: return normalized return None def extract_diameter_from_text(text: str) -> Optional[float]: if not text: return None normalized = clean_cad_text(text) patterns = [ r"⌀\s*(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)", r"直径\s*(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)", r"\bD\s*(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)", ] for pattern in patterns: match = re.search(pattern, normalized, flags=re.IGNORECASE) if match: return round(float(match.group(1)), 3) return None def classify_feature_type(code: str, text: str) -> str: text = text or "" if "沉孔" in text or "沉头" in text: return "counterbore" if "攻牙" in text or "攻" in text or re.search(r"\bM\d+", text, flags=re.IGNORECASE): return "thread_hole" if "割" in text or "线割" in text or "刀口" in text: return "wire_cut" if "槽" in text: return "slot_or_wire_cut" if code in FEATURE_RULES: return FEATURE_RULES[code]["type"] return "unknown" def build_process_notes(raw: dict) -> list[str]: notes = [] for t in raw.get("texts", []): text = t.get("text", "") layer = t.get("layer", "") if is_title_or_border_layer(layer): continue if is_valid_process_note(text): notes.append(text) return unique_keep_order(notes) def build_code_description_map(raw: dict) -> dict: code_descriptions = {} for t in raw.get("texts", []): text = t.get("text", "") layer = t.get("layer", "") if is_title_or_border_layer(layer): continue code = extract_feature_code_from_text(text, strict=False) if not code: continue if not is_valid_process_note(text): continue code_descriptions.setdefault(code, []) code_descriptions[code].append(text) return { code: unique_keep_order(values) for code, values in code_descriptions.items() } def associate_texts_to_circles(raw: dict, max_distance: float = 60.0) -> list[dict]: """ 将附近文字代号和圆孔实体关联。 注意： - 不再简单排除 51NOTE。 - 只排除 A : xxx / G : xxx 这种加工说明定义。 - 独立 A、G、J、L1 等代号可以参与绑定。 """ features = [] circles = raw.get("circles", []) texts = raw.get("texts", []) code_descriptions = build_code_description_map(raw) candidates = [] for t in texts: text = t.get("text", "") layer = t.get("layer", "") if is_title_or_border_layer(layer): continue if is_process_definition_text(text): continue if not is_valid_feature_label_text(text): continue code = extract_feature_code_from_text(text, strict=True) if not code: continue tx = t.get("x") ty = t.get("y") if tx is None or ty is None: continue text_point = { "x": tx, "y": ty, } for idx, circle in enumerate(circles): if is_title_or_border_layer(circle.get("layer", "")): continue circle_point = { "x": circle["x"], "y": circle["y"], } d = distance(text_point, circle_point) if d <= max_distance: candidates.append({ "circle_index": idx, "code": code, "text": text, "text_x": tx, "text_y": ty, "distance": d, "circle": circle, "text_entity": t, }) candidates.sort(key=lambda item: item["distance"]) used_circles = set() used_labels = set() for item in candidates: circle_index = item["circle_index"] label_key = ( item["code"], round(item["text_x"], 3), round(item["text_y"], 3), ) if circle_index in used_circles: continue if label_key in used_labels: continue used_circles.add(circle_index) used_labels.add(label_key) code = item["code"] circle = item["circle"] descriptions = code_descriptions.get(code, []) description = "；".join(descriptions[:3]) if descriptions else code diameter_from_text = extract_diameter_from_text(description) diameter = diameter_from_text or circle.get("diameter") features.append({ "code": code, "type": classify_feature_type(code, description), "label": FEATURE_RULES.get(code, {}).get("label", code), "description": description, "x": circle["x"], "y": circle["y"], "radius": round(diameter / 2, 3) if diameter else circle.get("radius"), "diameter": diameter, "source": "text_near_circle", "text_x": item["text_x"], "text_y": item["text_y"], "distance_to_label": round(item["distance"], 3), "layer": circle.get("layer"), "layout": circle.get("layout"), }) return features def infer_features_from_process_notes(raw: dict) -> list[dict]: definitions = [] code_descriptions = build_code_description_map(raw) for code, descriptions in code_descriptions.items(): description = "；".join(descriptions[:3]) diameter = extract_diameter_from_text(description) definitions.append({ "code": code, "type": classify_feature_type(code, description), "label": FEATURE_RULES.get(code, {}).get("label", code), "description": description, "diameter": diameter, "radius": round(diameter / 2, 3) if diameter else None, "source": "process_definition", "has_position": False, }) return definitions def merge_duplicate_features(features: list[dict]) -> list[dict]: merged = [] seen = set() for f in features: code = f.get("code") x = f.get("x") y = f.get("y") diameter = f.get("diameter") key = ( code, round(x, 2) if isinstance(x, (int, float)) else None, round(y, 2) if isinstance(y, (int, float)) else None, round(diameter, 2) if isinstance(diameter, (int, float)) else None, ) if key in seen: continue seen.add(key) merged.append(f) return merged def build_feature_model(raw: dict) -> dict: part = extract_part_info(raw) process_notes = build_process_notes(raw) positioned_features = associate_texts_to_circles(raw, max_distance=60.0) feature_definitions = infer_features_from_process_notes(raw) positioned_features = merge_duplicate_features(positioned_features) found_codes = { f["code"] for f in positioned_features + feature_definitions if f.get("code") } positioned_codes = { f["code"] for f in positioned_features if f.get("code") } missing_codes = sorted(EXPECTED_FEATURE_CODES - found_codes) definition_only_codes = sorted(found_codes - positioned_codes) warnings = [] if missing_codes: warnings.append( "加工说明或图纸中未识别到以下特征代号: " + ", ".join(missing_codes) ) if definition_only_codes: warnings.append( "以下特征只有加工说明，暂未绑定到具体孔位/几何: " + ", ".join(definition_only_codes) ) if not positioned_features: warnings.append( "未识别到可渲染的坐标特征。当前会显示红色调试孔位；请检查文字代号是否转曲、代号与孔位距离是否过远，或是否需要线割轮廓识别。" ) return { "part": part, "features": positioned_features, "feature_definitions": feature_definitions, "process_notes": process_notes, "found_feature_codes": sorted(found_codes), "positioned_feature_codes": sorted(positioned_codes), "missing_feature_codes": missing_codes, "raw_counts": { "texts": len(raw.get("texts", [])), "dimensions": len(raw.get("dimensions", [])), "circles": len(raw.get("circles", [])), "arcs": len(raw.get("arcs", [])), "lines": len(raw.get("lines", [])), "polylines": len(raw.get("polylines", [])), }, "warnings": warnings + raw.get("warnings", []), } # ============================================================ # 7. SVG 渲染 # ============================================================ def get_feature_bounds(model: dict, raw: dict) -> dict: part = model.get("part", {}) estimated_bounds = part.get("estimated_bounds") feature_xs = [] feature_ys = [] for f in model.get("features", []): x = f.get("x") y = f.get("y") diameter = f.get("diameter") or 8.0 radius = max(float(diameter) / 2, 4.0) if isinstance(diameter, (int, float)) else 4.0 if isinstance(x, (int, float)) and isinstance(y, (int, float)): feature_xs.extend([x - radius, x + radius]) feature_ys.extend([y - radius, y + radius]) # The DXF entity bounds often include title blocks or far-away construction # entities. The visual board should focus on the recognized machining # features first, otherwise the real holes collapse into one corner. if feature_xs and feature_ys: min_x = min(feature_xs) max_x = max(feature_xs) min_y = min(feature_ys) max_y = max(feature_ys) margin = max(max_x - min_x, max_y - min_y, 1.0) * 0.18 return { "min_x": min_x - margin, "max_x": max_x + margin, "min_y": min_y - margin, "max_y": max_y + margin, "width": max_x - min_x + margin * 2, "height": max_y - min_y + margin * 2, "source": "feature_bounds", } if estimated_bounds: min_x = estimated_bounds.get("min_x") max_x = estimated_bounds.get("max_x") min_y = estimated_bounds.get("min_y") max_y = estimated_bounds.get("max_y") if None not in [min_x, max_x, min_y, max_y]: return { "min_x": float(min_x), "max_x": float(max_x), "min_y": float(min_y), "max_y": float(max_y), "width": float(max_x - min_x), "height": float(max_y - min_y), "source": "estimated_bounds", } xs = [] ys = [] for f in model.get("features", []): if isinstance(f.get("x"), (int, float)) and isinstance(f.get("y"), (int, float)): xs.append(f["x"]) ys.append(f["y"]) for c in raw.get("circles", []): if is_title_or_border_layer(c.get("layer", "")): continue xs.extend([c["x"] - c["radius"], c["x"] + c["radius"]]) ys.extend([c["y"] - c["radius"], c["y"] + c["radius"]]) for line in raw.get("lines", []): if is_title_or_border_layer(line.get("layer", "")): continue xs.extend([line["start"]["x"], line["end"]["x"]]) ys.extend([line["start"]["y"], line["end"]["y"]]) for poly in raw.get("polylines", []): if is_title_or_border_layer(poly.get("layer", "")): continue for p in poly.get("points", []): xs.append(p["x"]) ys.append(p["y"]) if xs and ys: min_x = min(xs) max_x = max(xs) min_y = min(ys) max_y = max(ys) return { "min_x": min_x, "max_x": max_x, "min_y": min_y, "max_y": max_y, "width": max_x - min_x, "height": max_y - min_y, "source": "geometry_bounds", } width = part.get("width") or 400.0 height = part.get("height") or 300.0 return { "min_x": 0.0, "max_x": float(width), "min_y": 0.0, "max_y": float(height), "width": float(width), "height": float(height), "source": "fallback_part_size", } def make_mapper(bounds: dict, canvas_w: int, canvas_h: int, padding: int): real_w = max(bounds["width"], 1.0) real_h = max(bounds["height"], 1.0) scale = min( (canvas_w - 2 * padding) / real_w, (canvas_h - 2 * padding) / real_h, ) def mapper(x: float, y: float) -> tuple[float, float]: sx = padding + (x - bounds["min_x"]) * scale sy = padding + (bounds["max_y"] - y) * scale return round(sx, 3), round(sy, 3) return mapper, scale def render_feature_svg(model: dict, raw: dict, debug: bool = False) -> str: canvas_w = 900 canvas_h = 700 header_h = 120 padding = 70 bounds = get_feature_bounds(model, raw) base_map_xy, scale = make_mapper(bounds, canvas_w, canvas_h - header_h, padding) def map_xy(x: float, y: float) -> tuple[float, float]: sx, sy = base_map_xy(x, y) return sx, round(sy + header_h, 3) part = model.get("part", {}) features = model.get("features", []) plate_x, plate_y = map_xy(bounds["min_x"], bounds["max_y"]) plate_w = bounds["width"] * scale plate_h = bounds["height"] * scale found_codes = ", ".join(model.get("found_feature_codes", [])) or "无" positioned_codes = ", ".join(model.get("positioned_feature_codes", [])) or "无" missing_codes = ", ".join(model.get("missing_feature_codes", [])) or "无" min_x = round(bounds["min_x"], 2) max_x = round(bounds["max_x"], 2) min_y = round(bounds["min_y"], 2) max_y = round(bounds["max_y"], 2) source = svg_escape(bounds["source"]) svg = [] svg.append(f''' ") return "\n".join(svg) # ============================================================ # 8. Markdown 输出 # ============================================================ def append_feature_section(output: list[str], model: dict) -> None: output.append("## 3. 特征识别结果") output.append("") features = model.get("features", []) definitions = model.get("feature_definitions", []) output.append("### 3.1 已绑定坐标的实体特征") output.append("") if features: for f in features: output.append( f"- {f.get('code', '?')} | " f"类型: {f.get('type', 'unknown')} | " f"坐标: ({f.get('x')}, {f.get('y')}) | " f"直径: {f.get('diameter')} | " f"说明: {f.get('description', '')}" ) else: output.append("- 暂无已绑定坐标的实体特征。") output.append("") output.append("### 3.2 仅在加工说明中出现的特征定义") output.append("") if definitions: for f in definitions: output.append( f"- {f.get('code', '?')} | " f"类型: {f.get('type', 'unknown')} | " f"直径: {f.get('diameter')} | " f"说明: {f.get('description', '')}" ) else: output.append("- 暂无说明型特征定义。") output.append("") def build_markdown_report(model: dict, raw: dict, svg: str) -> str: output = [] part = model.get("part", {}) output.append("# 机械模具图纸矢量数据智能解析报告") output.append("") output.append("## 1. 零件基础信息") output.append("") output.append(f"- 零件名称: {part.get('name') or '未识别'}") output.append(f"- 材料: {part.get('material') or '未识别'}") output.append(f"- 宽度: {part.get('width') or '未识别'}") output.append(f"- 高度: {part.get('height') or '未识别'}") output.append(f"- 厚度: {part.get('thickness') or '未识别'}") if part.get("estimated_bounds"): b = part["estimated_bounds"] output.append( f"- 实体估算边界: X {b.get('min_x')} ~ {b.get('max_x')}, " f"Y {b.get('min_y')} ~ {b.get('max_y')}" ) output.append("") output.append("## 2. 解析统计") output.append("") counts = model.get("raw_counts", {}) output.append(f"- TEXT / MTEXT / ATTRIB 文本数量: {counts.get('texts', 0)}") output.append(f"- DIMENSION 尺寸数量: {counts.get('dimensions', 0)}") output.append(f"- CIRCLE 圆/孔数量: {counts.get('circles', 0)}") output.append(f"- ARC 圆弧数量: {counts.get('arcs', 0)}") output.append(f"- LINE 线段数量: {counts.get('lines', 0)}") output.append(f"- POLYLINE 多段线数量: {counts.get('polylines', 0)}") output.append("") append_feature_section(output, model) output.append("## 4. 加工说明") output.append("") process_notes = model.get("process_notes", []) if process_notes: for note in process_notes: output.append(f"- {note}") else: output.append("- 未识别到加工说明。") output.append("") output.append("## 5. 动态看板") output.append("") output.extend(render_feature_markdown_board(model)) output.append("") output.append("## 6. 结构化 JSON") output.append("") output.append("```json") output.append(json.dumps(model, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)) output.append("```") output.append("") output.append("## 7. 解析告警") output.append("") warnings = model.get("warnings", []) if warnings: for w in warnings[:80]: output.append(f"- {w}") else: output.append("- 无明显告警。") output.append("") output.append("## 8. DXF 实体统计") output.append("") stats = raw.get("entity_stats", {}) if stats: for key, value in sorted(stats.items()): output.append(f"- {key}: {value}") else: output.append("- 无实体统计。") return "\n".join(output).strip() # ============================================================ # 9. RAGFlow 入口 # ============================================================ def main(tz: list[Any]) -> str: if not tz: return "RAGFlow提示：未接收到上游传入的图纸数据 tz" try: raw_content = str(tz[0]).strip() dxf_text = decode_base64_dxf(raw_content) except Exception as exc: return f"Base64解码失败: {exc}" try: doc = parse_dxf_document(dxf_text) except Exception as exc: return f"DXF矢量解析失败: {exc}" try: raw = extract_raw_entities(doc) model = build_feature_model(raw) # debug=True：即使没有成功绑定 A/G，也会用红色显示解析出的真实圆孔。 # 正式上线后可以改成 False。 svg = render_feature_svg(model, raw, debug=True) return build_markdown_report(model, raw, svg) except Exception as exc: return f"DXF内容解析失败: {exc}"
